sales.description:
Tiberius, AD 14-37. Gold Aureus (7.46g) 19 mm. Struck at Lugdunum, after AD 16. Laureate head of Tiberius facing r. Reverse:  Livia as Pax, seated r., hollding sceptre and branch. S-1760; RIC 25. This is the famous "Tribute Penny" of the Bible struck in gold! NGC graded Fine; Strike: 5/5, Surface: 3/5.  Well centered with even wear. Always in demand.  Estimated Value $1,500 - UP
Ex The Peter Preovolos Collection....
